name: Nexus-MD
description: A powerful, multi-functional WhatsApp automation bot designed to elevate the general chat experience with smart tools and utilities.

SESSION_ID.description: Your unique bot session ID (starts with NEXUS~ or BWM~).

SUDO.description: The Super-Admin phone number with country code (e.g. 254797715445). Can run system commands.

OWNERS.description: Additional admin phone numbers, separated by commas (e.g., 254711111111,254722222222).
